summary: Added config.SaveAPIToken and pointed `auth set-token` at it so the token persists to api_token (the field saClient reads) instead of access_token.
reason: The generated OAuth-shaped SaveTokens stores into access_token and clears api_token, so following the documented `auth set-token` setup left every API command failing with 'no StackAdapt token'. Greptile P1.
validated_outcome: After `auth set-token DUMMY`, config writes api_token; `account` reads it and reaches the API (HTTP 401 on the dummy) instead of erroring 'no StackAdapt token'.
